name: VS Code Insiders
description: Visual Studio Code Insiders is the nightly preview channel of VS Code, shipping daily builds with the latest features and fixes alongside the stable release.

years.notes: Green chevron variant of the 2017 VS Code icon refresh — Insiders shipped its first preview builds in late 2016, but this is the canonical green chevron silhouette that has shipped since the October 2017 redesign (see https://code.visualstudio.com/blogs/2017/10/24/theicon).
